title: Fix illegal assignment of constant to unpacked array

features.name: unpacked_array_parameter_with_concatenation_connection
features.description: Code should include a parameter of unpacked array type passed via module instance connection using concatenation syntax
features.snippet:
module child #(parameter logic [31:0] arr[2] = {32'h0, 32'h0}); endmodule
module parent; logic [31:0] a = 32'h1; logic [31:0] b = 32'h2; child #(.arr({a, b})) i(); endmodule

features.name: unpacked_array_parameter_element_access_in_generate
features.description: Code should include a generate loop accessing elements of an unpacked array parameter
features.snippet: module t #(parameter logic [31:0] arr[2] = {32'h0, 32'h0}); logic [1:0] match; generate genvar i; for (i = 0; i < 2; i++) assign match[i] = &(arr[i]); endgenerate endmodule

features.name: two_element_unpacked_array_parameter_default
features.description: Code should include a parameter declared as a two-element unpacked array with a two-element array literal default value

features.name: unpacked_array_parameter_reduction_in_generate
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator applied to an unpacked array parameter element accessed within a generate loop
features.snippet: generate genvar i; for (i = 0; i < 2; i++) assign r[i] = &(arr[i]); endgenerate
